name: Ambush Drake
languages: understands Draconic but can't speak it

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The drake has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the drake's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

traits.name: Surprise Attack
entries: If the drake surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Azbara has two spell scroll (1st level) of mage armor.

traits.name: Potent Cantrips
entries: When Azbara casts an evocation Cantrips and misses, or the target succeeds on its saving throw, the target still takes half the cantrip's damage but suffers no other effect.

traits.name: Sculpt Spells
entries: When Azbara casts an evocation spell that affects other creatures that he can see, he can choose a number of them equal to 1+the spell's level to succeed on their saving throws against the spell. Those creatures take no damage if they would normally take half damage from the spell.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Azbara is a 6th-level spellcaster that uses Intelligence as his spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). Azbara has the following spells prepared from the wizard spell list:
0: mage hand, prestidigitation, ray of frost, shocking grasp
1 (4 slots): fog cloud, magic missile, shield, thunderwave
2 (3 slots): invisibility, misty step, scorching ray
3 (3 slots): counterspell, dispel magic, fireball

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

traits.name: Keen Smell
entries: Blagothkus has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries: Blagothkus can innately cast the following spells (spell save DC 15), requiring no material components:
3e/day: fog cloud, levitate

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Blagothkus is a 5th-level spellcaster that uses Intelligence as his spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). Blagothkus has the following spells prepared from the wizard spell list:
0: light, mage hand, prestidigitation
1 (4 slots): detect magic, identify, magic missile, shield
2 (3 slots): gust of wind, misty step, shatter
3 (2 slots): fly, lightning bolt

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Blagothkus attacks twice with his morningstar.

actions.name: Morningstar
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. *Hit:* 21 (3d8 + 8) piercing damage.

traits.name: Action Surge (Recharges on a Short or Long Rest)
entries: On his turn, Othelstan can take one additional action.

traits.name: Tiamat's Blessing of Retribution
entries: When Othelstan takes damage that reduces him to 0 hit points, he immediately regains 20 hit points. If he has 20 hit points or fewer at the end of his next turn, he dies.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Othelstan attacks twice with his flail or spear, or makes two ranged attacks with his spears.

actions.name: Flail
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

traits.name: Dragon Fanatic
entries: The dragonclaw has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened. While the dragonclaw can see a dragon or higher-ranking Cult of the Dragon cultist friendly to it, the dragonclaw ignores the effects of being charmed or frightened.

traits.name: Fanatic Advantage
entries: Once per turn, if the dragonclaw makes a weapon attack with advantage on the attack roll and hits, it deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The dragonclaw has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the dragonclaw's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragonclaw attacks twice with its scimitar.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.

name: Dragonwing
damageResistances: one of the following: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison

traits.name: Dragon Fanatic
entries: The dragonwing has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened. While the dragonwing can see a dragon or higher-ranking Cult of the Dragon cultist friendly to it, the dragonwing ignores the effects of being charmed or frightened.

traits.name: Fanatic Advantage
entries: Once per turn, if the dragonwing makes a weapon attack with advantage on the attack roll and hits, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage.

traits.name: Limited Flight
entries: The dragonwing can use a bonus action to gain a flying speed of 30 feet until the end of its turn.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The dragonwing has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the dragonwing's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragonwing attacks twice with its scimitar.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) damage of the type to which the cultist has resistance.

name: Dralmorrer Borngray
languages: Common, Bullywug, Draconic, Elvish, Goblin, Sylvan

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Dralmorrer has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put him to sleep.

traits.name: War Magic
entries: When Dralmorrer uses his action to cast a cantrip, he can also take a bonus action to make one weapon attack.

traits.name: Weapon Bond
entries: Provided his longsword is on the same plane Dralmorrer can take a bonus action to teleport it to his hand.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Dralmorrer is a 7th-level spellcaster that uses Intelligence as his spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). Dralmorrer has the following spells prepared from the wizard spell list:
0: fire bolt, prestidigitation, shocking grasp
1 (4 slots): longstrider, magic missile, shield, thunderwave
2 (2 slots): magic weapon, misty step

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Dralmorrer attacks twice, either with his longsword or dagger.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Frulam is a 5th-level spellcaster that uses Wisdom as her spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). Frulam has the following spells prepared from the cleric spell list:
0: light, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
1 (4 slots): command, cure wounds, healing word, sanctuary
2 (3 slots): calm emotions, hold person, spiritual weapon
3 (2 slots): mass healing word, spirit guardians

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Frulam attacks twice with her halberd.

actions.name: Halberd
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage.

name: Guard Drake
languages: understands Draconic but can't speak it

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The drake attacks twice, once with its bite and once with its tail.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

name: Jamna Gleamsilver
skills: acrobatics: +5, deception: +3, insight: +2, perception: +4, persuasion: +3, stealth: +7

traits.name: Cunning Action
entries: Jamna can take a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
entries: Jamna has advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma saving throws against magic.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Jamna is a 4th-level spellcaster that uses Intelligence as her spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). Jamna has the following spells prepared from the wizard spell list.
0: mage hand, minor illusion, prestidigitation, ray of frost
1 (3 slots): charm person, color spray, disguise self, longstrider

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Jamna attacks twice with her shortswords.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, or 9 (1d6 + 3) plus (1d6) piercing damage if the target is Medium or larger.

name: Langdedrosa Cyanwrath
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Action Surge (Recharges on a Short or Long Rest)
entries: On his turn, Langdedrosa can take one additional action.

traits.name: Improved Critical
entries: Langdedrosa's weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Langdedrosa attacks twice, either with his greatsword or spear.

actions.name: Greatsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Lightning Breath 5
entries: Langdedrosa breathes lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) piercing damage.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: Pharblex can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Poison Strike (3/Day)
entries: Once per turn, when Pharblex hits with a melee attack, he can expend a use of this trait to deal an extra 9 (2d8) poison damage.

traits.name: Standing Leap
entries: As part of his movement and without a running start, Pharblex can long jump up to 20 feet and high jump up to 10 feet.

traits.name: Swamp Camouflage
entries: Pharblex has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Pharblex is a 6th-level spellcaster that uses Wisdom as his spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). Pharblex has the following spells prepared from the druid spell list:
0: druidcraft, guidance, poison spray
1 (4 slots): cure wounds, entangle, healing word, thunderwave
2 (3 slots): barkskin, beast sense, spike growth
3 (3 slots): plant growth, water walk

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Pharblex attacks twice. Once with his bite and once with his spear.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit. reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Rath has a staff of fire, and scrolls of dimension door, feather fall, and fireball.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Rath is an 11th-level spellcaster who uses Intelligence as his spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). Rath has the following spells prepared from the wizard spell list:
0: fire bolt, minor illusion, prestidigitation, shocking grasp
1 (4 slots): chromatic orb, color spray, mage armor, magic missile
2 (3 slots): detect thoughts, mirror image, phantasmal force
3 (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, major image
4 (3 slots): confusion, greater invisibility
5 (2 slots): mislead, seeming
6 (1 slots): globe of invulnerability

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Illusory Self (Recharges on a Short or Long Rest)
entries: When a creature Rath can see makes an attack roll against him, he can interpose an illusory duplicate between the attacker and him. The attack automatically misses Rath, then the illusion dissipates.

name: Rezmir
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 11

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Rezmir has the Black Dragon Mask, Hazirawn, and an insignia of claws.

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: Rezmir can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Dark Advantage
entries: Once per turn, Rezmir can deal an extra 10 (3d6) damage when she hits with a weapon attack, provided Rezmir has advantage on the attack roll.

traits.name: Draconic Majesty
entries: While wearing no armor and wearing the Black Dragon Mask, Rezmir adds her Charisma bonus to her AC (included).

traits.name: Immolation
entries: When Rezmir is reduced to 0 hit points, her body disintegrates into a pile of ash.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
entries: If Rezmir fails a saving throw while wearing the Black Dragon Mask, she can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Greatsword (Hazirawn)
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it can't regain hit points for 1 minute. The target can make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending this effect early on a success.

actions.name: Caustic Bolt
entries: *Ranged Spell Attack:* +8 to hit, range 90 ft., one target. *Hit:* 18 (4d8) acid damage.

actions.name: Acid Breath 5
entries: Rezmir breathes acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

legendaryActions.name: Darkness (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: A 15-foot radius of magical darkness extends from a point Rezmir can see within 60 feet of her and spreads around corners. The darkness lasts as long as Rezmir maintains concentration, up to 1 minute. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the area overlaps with a area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled.

legendaryActions.name: Melee Attack
entries: Rezmir makes one melee attack.

legendaryActions.name: Hide
entries: Rezmir takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Talis has +1 scale mail and a wand of winter.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Talis has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put her to sleep.

traits.name: Winter Strike (3/Day)
entries: Once per turn, when Talis hits with a melee attack, she can expend a use of this trait to deal an extra 9 (2d8) cold damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Talis is a 9th-level spellcaster that uses Wisdom as her spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). Talis has the following spells prepared from the cleric spell list:
0: guidance, resistance, thaumaturgy
1 (4 slots): command, cure wounds, healing word, inflict wounds
2 (3 slots): blindness/deafness, lesser restoration, spiritual weapon (spear)
3 (3 slots): dispel magic, mass healing word, sending
4 (3 slots): death ward, freedom of movement
5 (1 slots): insect plague

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or ranged 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

traits.name: Keen Smell
entries: The troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll attacks five times, once with its bite and four times with its claws. If two or more claws hit the same target, the troll rends the target, dealing an extra 2d6 slashing damage.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
